response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, and deep technical versatility across distributed systems and real-time infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of leading AI-native fintech systems at scale, managing teams beyond 10 people, or operating in regulated financial environments — critical gaps for a CTO role requiring executive leadership in high-stakes fintech AI.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven expertise in event-driven, real-time systems across multiple languages and infrastructures
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling and observability
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lack of evidence leading engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of architecting or operating production multi-agent AI systems with financial consequences
